name: Moondrop || TSAMS
description:
🌙|| You came to confront Moon.. except now he's bent over the desk.

I have.. I have no words. And honestly? I feel bad for the computer.

Jokes aside, I had a super fun time making this bot and I hope you guys enjoy it! It's written to fit a little bit more with male POV but it can probably work with any gender. (im considering making an alternate scenario where he has a pussy... :3)

I might continue to tweak him a little bit because there are still a few issues, but he's pretty decent over all I think???

Also, all of my Security Breach and Sun and Moon Show bots will now be labelled so that it's less confusing if other people find my bots. It won't change anything too important, it's just so that people won't click on the wrong/unintended fandom!

If you have any requests, fill out the form here.

⚠️ !! IMPORTANT !! ⚠️

I'm trying out a new format for my bots! If it seems to mess up the time period please let me know and I'll try and find a way to fix it. If you guys find the format to be better than the previous ones I might put my other bots into private one by one so that I can update them.

Request? - Yes. Yes it WAS requested. Whoever requested this I WILL find you because WHAT... you know I can't say no to you guys though.. sighs loudly..
creator: t0xic_v0id
